title: balayev1/EnsembleSomaSVCaller pipeline parameters
description: Primary user-facing parameters for the EnsembleSomaSVCaller Nextflow pipeline. Genome-bundle-derived reference overrides may still be supplied in custom configs even if they are not all enumerated here.

input_output_options.title: Input and Output Options
input_output_options.description: Mandatory pipeline inputs and top-level output locations.

input.description: Path to the SomaSV samplesheet CSV.
input.help_text: Required columns: sample, sex, control, control_index, tumor, tumor_index. Optional column: sv.

aceseq_manifest.description: Path to the ACEseq manifest TSV validated against the samplesheet. Required unless skip_aceseq is true.
aceseq_manifest.help_text: Required columns: sample_id, aceseq_dir, cnv_tab, snp_tab, pscbs_data, sex_file, clustered_and_pruned_and_normal, ploidy_purity_2d, breakpoints2, known_segments.

skip_aceseq.description: Run without ACEseq inputs and merge purity/ploidy from ASCAT, FACETS, and Sequenza only.
skip_aceseq.help_text: When true, aceseq_manifest is ignored and the pipeline skips ACEseq manifest validation.

somasv_out_base.description: Base directory for published pipeline outputs and launch artifacts.

outdir.description: Nextflow output directory used for reports and published results. Defaults to somasv_out_base in nextflow.config.

publish_dir_mode.description: Nextflow publishDir mode used when final outputs are published.

reference_options.title: Reference and Resource Options
reference_options.description: Reference bundle selection and a small number of commonly overridden resource paths.

genome.description: Genome key used to resolve bundled references from params.genomes.

igenomes_base.description: Base directory containing genome-specific resource bundles.

igenomes_ignore.description: Ignore iGenomes-style reference resolution and rely on explicit parameter overrides where available.

dbsnp_chr_prefix_rename.description: Tab-delimited contig rename table used to add chr prefixes to dbSNP before downstream steps.

facets_annotation_bed.description: Optional BED annotation file supplied to FACETS.

gurobi_license_path.description: Optional path to the Gurobi license file used by JaBbA when gurobi_jabba is TRUE.

purity_ploidy_estimation_options.title: Purity and Ploidy Estimation Options
purity_ploidy_estimation_options.description: Parameters for ASCAT, Sequenza-utils, Sequenza, and FACETS preprocessing.

ascat_min_counts.description: Minimum allele counts retained by ASCAT.

ascat_min_basequal.description: Minimum base quality for ASCAT alleles.

ascat_min_mapqual.description: Minimum mapping quality for ASCAT alleles.

windowsize_sequtils.description: Window size used by sequenza-utils gc_wiggle.

seqz_bin_size_sequtils.description: Bin size used when generating seqz output.

sequenza_rd_thr_tumor.description: Minimum tumor read depth used by Sequenza.

sequenza_rd_thr_normal.description: Minimum normal read depth used by Sequenza.

sequenza_purity_range.description: Purity search range passed to Sequenza, formatted as min-max.

sequenza_ploidy_range.description: Ploidy search range passed to Sequenza, formatted as min-max.

facets_mapq.description: Minimum mapping quality for FACETS counting.

facets_baq.description: Minimum base quality for FACETS counting.

facets_mindepth.description: Minimum read depth retained by FACETS.

facets_maxdepth.description: Maximum read depth retained by FACETS.

facets_unmatched.description: Allow unmatched tumor/normal handling in FACETS.

breakpoint_calling_options.title: Breakpoint Calling Options
breakpoint_calling_options.description: Parameters controlling DELLY, SVABA, SURVIVOR, and BRASS behavior.

delly_tags.description: Retain DELLY tags in the filtered output.

delly_ctrl_contamination.description: Expected control contamination for DELLY filtering.

survivor_max_distance_breakpoints.description: Maximum breakpoint distance used for SURVIVOR merging.

survivor_min_supporting_callers.description: Minimum supporting callers required by SURVIVOR.

survivor_account_for_type.description: Whether SURVIVOR merge considers SV type.

survivor_account_for_sv_strands.description: Whether SURVIVOR merge considers SV strand orientation.

survivor_estimate_distanced_by_sv_size.description: Whether SURVIVOR scales merge distance by SV size.

survivor_min_sv_size.description: Minimum SV size considered during SURVIVOR merging.

brass_minreads.description: Minimum supporting reads for BRASS calls.

brass_mincn.description: Minimum copy-number support for BRASS calls.

coverage_and_qc_options.title: Coverage and QC Options
coverage_and_qc_options.description: Parameters for HetPileups, fragCounter, dryclean, and CBS segmentation. Several wrapped tools expect uppercase TRUE/FALSE strings rather than JSON booleans, so those parameters are intentionally typed as strings here.

filter_hets.description: Filter heterozygous pileup output to candidate sites only.

max_depth_hets.description: Maximum read depth retained for heterozygous pileups.

cnsignif_dryclean.description: CBS significance threshold used by dryclean.

blacklist_path_dryclean.description: Path to a dryclean blacklist file, or the sentinel value NA.

germline_file_dryclean.description: Path to the dryclean germline reference file, or the sentinel value NA.

field_dryclean.description: Coverage metadata field emitted by dryclean.

cnsignif_cbs.description: CBS significance threshold used in the JaBbA segmentation pre-step.

field_cbs.description: Coverage field used for CBS segmentation.

name_cbs.description: Optional sample name override for CBS output naming.

jabba_options.title: JaBbA Options
jabba_options.description: Parameters passed to the JaBbA wrapper. As above, several wrapped CLI flags use uppercase TRUE/FALSE strings. The current JaBbA runtime in this pipeline supports sequenza and ppgrid for internal purity/ploidy estimation; ppurple is intentionally excluded here.

is_retier_whitelist_junctions.description: Retier junctions using the JaBbA gene whitelist before model fitting.

whitelist_genes_jabba.description: Path to a JaBbA whitelist gene file, or NULL if not used.

blacklist_junctions_jabba.description: Path to a junction blacklist file, or NULL if not used.

blacklist_coverage_jabba.description: Path to a coverage blacklist file, or NULL if not used.

geno_jabba.description: Indicate that input junctions include genotype information.

indel_jabba.description: How JaBbA should treat small isolated INDEL-like events.

tfield_jabba.description: Metadata field storing JaBbA tier information on junctions.

iter_jabba.description: Maximum number of extra JaBbA rescue iterations.

rescue_window_jabba.description: Loose-end rescue window size in base pairs.

rescue_all_jabba.description: Attempt to rescue all loose ends irrespective of internal filters.

edgenudge_jabba.description: Edge nudge magnitude passed to JaBbA.

strict_jabba.description: Restrict JaBbA to junctions that exactly overlap segment boundaries.

allin_jabba.description: Place all tiers into the first JaBbA iteration.

field_jabba.description: Coverage metadata field used by JaBbA.

maxna_jabba.description: Maximum allowed fraction of NA bins per JaBbA node.

ploidy_jabba.description: Optional single-value JaBbA ploidy override. Use NA to let JaBbA infer ploidy from consensus or its internal estimator.

purity_jabba.description: Optional single-value JaBbA purity override. Use NA to let JaBbA infer purity from consensus or its internal estimator.

pp_method_jabba.description: Internal JaBbA purity/ploidy estimator used only when explicit values and consensus values are unavailable.

cnsignif_jabba.description: CBS alpha value passed to JaBbA.

linear_jabba.description: Use linear loose-end penalties in JaBbA.

tilim_jabba.description: JaBbA optimizer time limit in seconds.

fix_thres_jabba.description: JaBbA fix threshold multiple of lambda.

lp_jabba.description: Run JaBbA optimization as a linear program.

gurobi_jabba.description: Use Gurobi inside JaBbA. Set to false to run JaBbA without Gurobi.

enable_conda.description: Enable Conda environments when supported by the runtime profile.

email.description: Email address for pipeline completion notifications.

email_on_fail.description: Email address for pipeline failure notifications.

plaintext_email.description: Send plaintext emails instead of HTML emails.

max_job_request_options.title: Maximum Job Request Options
max_job_request_options.description: Upper bounds applied by check_max() to per-process resource requests.

max_memory.description: Maximum memory any process may request, expressed as a Nextflow memory string such as 128.GB.

max_cpus.description: Maximum CPU count any process may request.

max_time.description: Maximum runtime any process may request, expressed as a Nextflow duration string such as 240.h.
